notableEvents.label: Luis García Jr. GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Luis García Jr. grounds into a double play, second baseman Sung-Mun Song to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Ty France. James Wood out at 2nd. Luis García Jr. out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Griffin Canning picks off José Tena at 1st on throw to first baseman Ty France.

notableEvents.label: Andrés Chaparro pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrés Chaparro doubles (2) on a ground ball to left fielder Nick Castellanos. Nasim Nuñez scores. James Wood to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Allowed 74.6 mph
notableEvents.detail: Luis García Jr. · Grounded Into DP

notableEvents.label: Miguel Andujar pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Andujar challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Miguel Andujar called out on strikes and Sung-Mun Song caught stealing 2nd, catcher Keibert Ruiz to second baseman Jorbit Vivas to catcher Keibert Ruiz.
